problem:
Two ants A and B are carrying food back and forth between places A and B 20 meters apart. A starts from place A and B starts from place B at the same time. A's speed is 2 meters/second and B's speed is 3 meters/second. When two ants meet for the 18th time (note: encounters include head-on encounters and catching up in the same direction, the time spent by the ants carrying food is ignored) 1. How many meters away from site A is the meeting place? (Please keep the result to 1 decimal place)

The final answer format is: "20.0, same direction".

If the backlog of funds is 100 yuan, it is equivalent to a loss of 14 yuan per year), and the original deposit has 3 years left to mature. Now the school has decided to purchase coal for winter heating in early fall. According to past experience, 17 tons of coal are consumed under normal winter temperatures, but if the winter is relatively warm, only 12 tons of coal will be used; if the winter is relatively cold, 24 tons of coal will be used. The price of coal changes according to the coldness of the weather. In warmer, normal and colder weather, the price per ton of coal is 104 yuan, 150 yuan and 209 yuan respectively, while in early autumn it is 104 yuan per ton. The predicted probabilities of mild, normal, and cold temperatures in winter that year are 0.32, 0.32, and 0.36 respectively. How many tons of coal should the school purchase in early autumn (coal needs to be purchased by the ton)? Tip: The result needs to be such that the sum of cost and possible losses at each temperature is minimized. Note: If the school purchases too much coal in early autumn, the excess unused coal will form a backlog of funds; if the school does not purchase enough coal in early autumn, it will need to purchase again in winter.
